expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Ingest workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot ingest' invocation
Agent loads references/kb-operations.md to follow the ingest ordering and evidence-preservation rules
Agent preserves the original sources under raw/ before adding any captures, extracts, or source-summary material
Agent keeps normalized extracts or transcripts separate from the originals instead of rewriting the source files in place
Agent updates indexes/source-map.md and indexes/coverage.md in the same batch as the ingest work
Agent appends an activity-log entry that records the import details, provenance status, and unresolved gaps
